user_story: As a Resource Manager, I want to add a new project role, so that resources can be assigned appropriate roles on projects
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Project Roles screen; When I click Add new project role and provide the role and applicable project types; Then the project role is saved and listed

user_story: As a Resource Manager, I want to search project roles, so that I can quickly find a specific role
acceptance_criteria: Given project roles exist; When I enter a Project role and click Search; Then only matching roles are listed

user_story: As a Resource Manager, I want to reset the project role search, so that I can view the full list again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied a search; When I click Reset; Then the filter clears and all project roles are shown

user_story: As a Resource Manager, I want to view the questions associated with a project role, so that I understand its evaluation criteria
acceptance_criteria: Given a project role is listed; When I click View questions; Then the associated questions are displayed

user_story: As a Resource Manager, I want to edit a project role and its applicable project types, so that role-to-project-type mappings stay accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given a project role is listed; When I click Edit and change its project types; Then the updated mapping is saved
